title: polygala senensis var. calcicola
intro: Polygala senensis var. calcicola, also known as Senega or Polygala root, is a type of flowering plant in the milkwort family (Polygalaceae) that is native to mountainous regions of Eastern Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and antitussive effects, which are used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Polygala senensis var. calcicola include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Polygala senensis var. calcicola typically involve drying and processing the root, which can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules for consumption.
